differentials.name: Autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease
differentials.raw: Autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease (ADPKD); autoptic liver (pancreatic) cysts in 90% (9%)

differentials.name: Von Hippel-Lindau disease pancreatic cysts in 72%
differentials.raw: Von Hippel-Lindau disease pancreatic cysts in 72% (25%) at autopsy (CT)
